title: 企业单点登录 (SSO) 安全保护对接
description: 接入企业级安全 LDAP 校验与 OAuth 2.0 服务，强化账户防碰撞验证，支持多维度 RBAC 数据级越权保护。
description_en: Integrate enterprise LDAP and OAuth 2.0 services. Strengthen account brute-force protection and support multidimensional RBAC for data authorization.

title: 团队敏捷工作台流式大模型对话卡片渲染
title_en: Streaming LLM Card Rendering in Agile Workspace
description: 开发流式生成式 UI 卡片渲染机制，深度绑定后台结构化 DSL 规则，支持在线组件级拖拽交互。
description_en: Develop streaming generative UI card rendering mechanism deeply bound to backend structured DSL rules. Support drag-and-drop interactions.

title: 项目多重视图与排期时间轴切换
title_en: Multi-View and Timeline Toggle in Projects
description: 开发看板排课树、需求列表树、以及跨模块甘特图的多重视图配置，优化大数据量下拖拽帧数。
description_en: Develop Kanban trees, list views, and cross-module Gantt charts. Optimize drag-and-drop performance for large datasets.

title: 双机沙箱数据库多租户数据落盘加密
description: 在全局 ORM 执行器层插入租户 ID 空间过滤器，使用 AES-256 加密落盘数据，满足金保级审计规范。
description_en: Inject tenant ID spatial filters into the global ORM executor layer. Use AES-256 for at-rest data encryption to meet financial audit specs.

title: 敏捷持续跑测测试套件自动化重试机制
title_en: Automated Retry Mechanism for CI Test Suites
description: 优化 CI 流水线测试套件并发环境，对低概率跑丢的测试加入最大 3 次指数退避重试保护。
description_en: Optimize CI pipeline concurrency for test suites, adding up to 3 exponential backoff retries for flaky tests.

title: 跨租户数据同步接口
description: 开发支持多租户间数据准实时同步的 API 层，支持增量消费，确保一致性。
description_en: Build an API layer supporting near-real-time synchronization between tenants with incremental consumption and eventual consistency.

title: 可视化发布流向节点树拓扑图在线构建
title_en: Visual Topology Builder for Release Flows
description: 使用高性能 canvas 渲染流水线多阶段节点拓扑图，提供触发、编译、制品、测试卡片等连线逻辑。
description_en: Render multi-stage pipeline topology using high-performance canvas, supporting triggers, builds, artifacts, and test card wiring.

title: 对接 K8s 容器交付接口 API 高可用调试
description: 对接底层 Kubernetes 容器交付 API 并做连接池和网关故障自愈隔离，确保大规模节点创建稳定度。
description_en: Integrate with underlying Kubernetes container delivery APIs. Add connection pooling and gateway fault isolation to ensure large-scale stability.

title: 流水线自动化多阶段质量门禁卡配置
title_en: Automated Multi-stage Quality Gates in Pipeline
description: 支持在流水线中间阶段插入Sonar静态代码检查及自动化覆盖率校验，不达标自动终止流水线动作。
description_en: Support Sonar static checks and coverage validation at pipeline stages, automatically terminating upon failure.

title: 蓝绿部署和金丝雀发布的快速回滚
description: 为生产环境的发布提供一键回滚策略，支持在流量异常时 30 秒内切换路由规则恢复历史版本。
description_en: Provide a one-click rollback strategy for production releases, allowing route swaps within 30s during traffic anomalies.

title: 对接企业精准知识库 RAG 语义向量匹配检索
title_en: RAG Semantic Vector Matching for Enterprise KB
description: 接入高精度向量嵌入大模型，构建 RAG 敏捷研发知识图谱，通过向量索引快速召回技术答案。
description_en: Adopt high-precision embedding models to build a RAG agile dev knowledge graph, utilizing vector indexing for tech answer recall.

title: 智能提取一键自动化工作流周报整理
title_en: Automated Weekly Report Extraction via LLM
description: 利用大模型一键提取项目迭代内的变更、测试结论与挂起缺陷，自动输出可配置富文本模板周报。
description_en: Extract sprint changes, test results, and open bugs using LLMs, outputting highly configurable rich-text weekly reports.

title: 意图分类器的少样本提示词调优
title_en: Few-Shot Prompt Tuning for Intent Classifier
description: 收集50个真实场景，通过 Few-shot 更新 Prompt 模板，提高从闲聊中提取创建 Bug 或 Requirement 意图的准确率。
description_en: Collect 50 real-world scenarios to update Prompt templates via Few-shot, improving accuracy of intent extraction for Bugs/Requirements in chat.

title: 全局快捷键调度模块
description: 实现全局快捷输入及搜索唤起，适配Mac/Win常用键位。
description_en: Implement global hotkeys for search, adapt for Mac/Win standard layouts.

title: 夜间模式深度适配及性能优化
title_en: Dark Mode Deep Adaptation & Perf Optimization
description: 支持主题色平滑切换与CSS变量替换，避免重排开销。
description_en: Smooth theme switching via CSS variables, avoid reflows.

title: 数据大盘图表懒加载优化
description: 实现按需渲染，提升首屏访问性能至少 30%。
description_en: Render on demand, increase initial load performance by at least 30%.

title: Docker镜像自动构建提速
description: 利用构建缓存与多阶段构建重构Dockerfile，降低打包时长。
description_en: Use build cache and multi-stage logic to reduce package time.

title: 集成安全扫描预警
description: 制品库提交后自动卡控安全漏洞，高于严重等级阻塞发布。
description_en: Auto block deployment on severity > High security holes.

title: 多区跨云集群资源同步
description: 实现跨供应商容器状态收集及控制平面聚合。
description_en: Collect multi-vendor container states to a single control plane.

title: 引入最新一代代码生成模型
description: 替换原有时效较慢模型，提升代码续写补全速度。
description_en: Replace slower models to improve code completion velocity.

title: 用户个性化上下文长期记忆
description: 基于用户偏好维持项目级对话Session并固化到向量库。
description_en: Maintain project-level session context based on user preference to vector DB.

title: 智能推荐日常开发依赖库
description: 分析源码推测依赖并在Agent侧栏一键推荐。
description_en: Analyze source to guess deps and provide one-click install in Agent panel.
